_comment: CME exchange + clearing + NFA fee per side, by futures root. `exchange` holds the CURRENT composite (snapshot mid-2026); `history` (F30) holds effective-dated prior periods, oldest first — each entry lists ONLY the roots a documented change moved (as { until: last day inclusive, exchange, source }); anything absent falls through to the next-newer period and finally the current map. CME adjusts transaction fees roughly every February. A171 expanded coverage; notMicro pins full-size roots whose ticker starts with M (MGEX wheat) so the tier heuristic can't misprice them. Edit values here, then run scripts/build-manifest.mjs to refresh the cache-busting hash.

history.source: CME transaction-fee change effective 2024-02-01 (AMP Futures notice, ampfutures.com/news/cme-exchange-fee-increase-effective-february-1-2024): CME/CBOT equity 1.33→1.38, NYMEX energy 1.50→1.60, COMEX/NYMEX metals 1.55→1.60 per contract — composites here shift by the same deltas (equity/metals −0.05, energy −0.10); all other symbols unchanged

CME transaction-fee change effective 2025-02-01 (AMP Futures notice, ampfutures.com/news/cme-exchange-fee-increase-effective-february-1-2025): CBOT ag futures 2.10→2.13, COMEX micro gold 0.50→0.60 per contract (raw + 0.02 NFA composite); NO change to CME/CBOT equity incl. micros. Same notice drove the 2026-07-04 correction of the stale current ZC/ZS/ZW (2.05→2.15) and MGC (0.50→0.62) composites
